description.unified: Summons 5 homing arrows that track enemies. Upon attacking, consumes 1 arrow to deal additional Physical DMG to the enemy.

Deals Physical DMG to enemies in a straight line and knocks them down for 3 sec. This damage increases based on the target’s lost HP, up to a maximum of 100%. Additionally, against Bosses, deals additional Physical DMG, and this damage is applied with [800->500] higher Physical DEF Penetration.

After using a Skill or Normal Attack, increases ATK by 24 and Crit Chance by 80 for 7sec. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to 6 times. At max stacks, [Moonlight Arrow] cannot be gained during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 additional arrows, each dealing [143% ATK -> 95.3% ATK] Physical DMG.

On Crit, increases ATK Spd by {0}% for 10 sec. During the duration, Normal Attacks fire an additional arrow that deals {1}% extra Physical DMG to the target. This additional DMG can be triggered once every 0.5 sec.
